name: Tuna Italiano Insalata
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked, drained bow tie or spiral pasta
1/2 cup drained, flaked tuna from a water-packed can
2 ounces low-fat jack or cheddar cheese, diced into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the dressing, combine all ingredients in a small container with a tightly fitting lid.
2. Cover tightly and shake thoroughly to mix.
3. In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients except endive.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat.
5. Chill for at least 1 hour.
6. To serve, arrange the salad in a serving bowl lined with endive spears.
